infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: EvidenceVault records the GPS location of an incident only when you choose to capture it.
infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: EvidenceVault uses the camera to capture photo and video evidence.
infoPlist.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: EvidenceVault uses the microphone to record audio evidence and statements.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: EvidenceVault lets you attach photos and videos from your library as evidence.
infoPlist.NSFaceIDUsageDescription: EvidenceVault uses Face ID to unlock your encrypted vault.

plugins.cameraPermission: EvidenceVault uses the camera to capture photo and video evidence.

plugins.microphonePermission: EvidenceVault uses the microphone to record audio evidence and statements.
